title: The Peculiar Ideal.
content:
What thou thinkest, belongs to all; what thou feelest, is thine only.
    Wouldst thou make him thine own, feel thou the God whom thou thinkest!
meaning:
Friedrich Schiller's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Peculiar Ideal."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
